name: Nekone
description: Ukon's younger sister, hailing from the land of Ennakamuy, a genius scholar widely considered to be a child prodigy, having passed the extremely rigorous imperial exam at a younger age than anyone before her, earning her the title of "Scholar of Philosophy". Even so, she is not made an official scholar due to her young age. name: Ruuko Kominato
description: The main character of the anime. Despite having no wish or drive to be an Eternal Girl, and being a complete beginner at the game, she was chosen as a selector. Her reason for battling is simply for the thrill and excitement from it. Ruuko is very caring and thoughtful to the others around her to the point she was willing to lose her battle with Yazuki and Hitoe in order for their wishes to come true. name: Rynzbelfeid
nativeName: リィンズベルフィード
description: A high-ranking wind spirit who has made a contract with [the Barrier Mage](https://anilist.co/character/344108). Her nickname is "Ryn". She usually appears as a maid, but can also take on other forms. She acts as a liaison between [Monica](https://anilist.co/character/249404) and Louis, and supports Monica on her top-secret mission. She seems to still be learning how to behave like a human.

name: Sakkyun
description: A succubus who desires popularity, and is jealous of the Princess, whom she believes is popular amongst the demons. Her fellow demons often pay her little attention, sometimes purposefully avoiding her. She sometimes is seen watching the Princess’ “quests” from the shadows. She is mostly referred to by the name “Cubey”.

description: Harada is one of the most cheerful of the Shinsengumi, He is usually making jokes with his friend Shinpachi and loves to makes other smile in a climax sometimes full of sadness and pain. He is very quick to get angry, but also very loyal and friendly. He prefer the spear to the sword. Sanosuke serves Kondo as personal adviser, in fact he always is been informative of everything and is a fencing master. He has a very proud determination. name: Sayu Hisanuma
description: A third grade elementary school girl with brown haired pigtails and eyes. She is Miuna's best friend who often instigates confrontations with sea people. She appears to have a crush on Kaname. ~! After the timeskip, she entered the same middle school as Hikari and the others. She also decided to be more serious at studying and becoming independent. !~

name: Sonoko Suzuki
description: Sonoko is [Ran Mouri's](https://anilist.co/character/1748/Ran-Mouri) best friend and is the girlfriend of [Makoto Kyogoku,](https://anilist.co/character/30368/Makoto-Kyogoku) with whom she currently is in a long-distance relationship. [Conan Edogawa](https://anilist.co/character/1742/Conan-Edogawa) sometimes has to knock her out with his stun gun watch to use her as his mouthpiece. name: Sumomo
description: Sumomo is a mobile persocom - which is the persocom equivalent of a laptop computer. She is programmed to be cute and tends to be quite hyperactive, for example her morning 'wakey wakey exercises'. At the beginning of the series, Shinbo uses Sumomo in an attempt to analyze Chi, and Sumomo is nearly broken in the process, requiring new main memory, and in the manga, a new video card as well. name: Tae Kojima
description: She is Kurono's first actual girlfriend, first dated on a dare. He actually falls in love with her, and they build a real relationship, Kurono appearing to be very protective of her. ~!After taking pictures of the Game's participants during their mission, she immediately becomes the next target (considering Gantz wants to remain unknown to outsiders). name: Takaaki Tsutsujimori
description: A part-time worker at Every Mart, he appears to be carefree and casual in both looks and behavior, seemingly irresponsible. However, he has a caring and protective side, akin to an older brother. After a chance encounter with Yoshihiro, he starts to take an interest in him and looks after him. (Source: Official Site)

name: Tasuki
description: Tasuki formerly led the Mount Reikaku bandits. Extremely quick and agile, he particularly enjoys joking around with Nuriko, Tamahome, and Chichiri. He is 17 years old and was born in the town of Tai-Tou in the Ko prefecture, at the foot of Mount Reikaku. His true name is Shunu Kou.

name: Tori Aoi
description: Tori is the Head of Musashi Ariadust Academy's Supreme Federation and President of the student council. His athletics and grades are average, and he's both self and publicly recognized as an incompetent leader. However, because he doesn't know the meaning of depressed and has an incredibly cheerful attitude, he's very respected nonetheless. He knows a lot of strip jokes, and often plays the fool. ~! She is a master swordsman who faced against both Yuto and Zenovia on separate occasions during their Rating Game. While she manages to defeat Zenovia, she failed to gain the upper hand against Yuto by sword skills alone. name: Tsubame Murota
description: A former delinquent in her youth, Tsubame Murota is a Magical Girl with the ability to travel at incredibly high speeds on her broomstick Rapid Swallow. She often confides in Ripple and is friendly and outgoing. ~!She is the eighth magical girl to die after being stabbed in the back by Swim Swim. Her unborn child died with her.!~

name: Wiper
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0) __Affiliations:__ Skypiea (Shandia) Wiper is the leader of the Shandian warriors fighting to take Upper Yard back from Enel, he fights with a Burn Bazooka. He is a direct descendant of Calgara, inheriting his violent tendencies. Wiper is very rough around the edges and has always hated both the Skypieans (despite Gan Fall's best efforts to attain peace between the two people during his time as "god") and anybody from the seas.
